code:
%%{Logistics_StockLevel}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (Logistics_FleetManagement)

[Logistics_StockLevel] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (Logistics_StockLevel)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (Logistics_StockLevel)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (Logistics_FleetManagement)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [Logistics_StockLevel] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流车队的库存同步设计一个状态机。核心场景是本地Hub和联邦网络之间的数据同步，特别是当本地检测到CRDT帧过期或者网络拓扑变化时，需要进入一种待同步状态。
明白。所以起点应该是本地库存状态检测到分歧，然后触发SyncRequested进入OUT_OF_SYNC状态。这个状态下需要记录具体的触发原因吗？比如缺失指标或者网络变化？
对，OUT_OF_SYNC右侧需要加注释说明三种典型情况：CRDT帧过期、缺失贡献数据或指标、以及网络拓扑变更。接下来通过BeginSync事件进入FETCH_REMOTE，从联邦节点拉取最新的向量时钟和状态差异。
已添加OUT_OF_SYNC的注释和到FETCH_REMOTE的转移。FETCH_REMOTE完成后通过FrameDownloaded进入MERGE状态，这里需要说明是应用CRDT合并函数并确定性解决冲突对吧？
没错。MERGE完成后进入VALIDATE，这里要做三件事：模式校验和哈希完整性检查、验证贡献和治理增量、还要验证远程Hub的签名。验证通过才能到达SYNCED最终状态。
SYNCED之后直接回到Logistics_FleetManagement吗？另外异常路径怎么处理？比如网络超时或者合并冲突无法解决的情况？
是的，SYNCED是正常终止。异常路径需要统一汇聚到FAILED状态：FETCH_REMOTE可能因网络超时或认证失败进入FAILED；MERGE可能因冲突未解决进入；VALIDATE可能因哈希不匹配或签名无效进入。FAILED之后要有重试机制，通过RetryScheduled到RETRY，再RetrySync回到OUT_OF_SYNC重新同步。
异常路径已添加。还有维护场景吗？比如定时同步或者Hub离线的情况？
需要两条维护路径：一是SYNCED可以通过PeriodicSync或参数变更回到OUT_OF_SYNC进行周期性同步；二是OUT_OF_SYNC如果检测到Hub离线或延迟过高，进入DEGRADED降级状态，最终上报运维。
确认一下整体结构：从Logistics_StockLevel开始，经过OUT_OF_SYNC→FETCH_REMOTE→MERGE→VALIDATE→SYNCED→Logistics_FleetManagement的主路径，加上三条异常汇聚到FAILED的重试循环，以及周期性同步和降级运维的分支。所有核心状态用橙色高亮。这样是否完整？
完整了。标题用SM-06.01 Hub Sync State，标注Logistics_FleetManagement领域。可以定稿。
